data.title: Polymarket's probability that "SpaceX will IPO before June 30" has risen to 75%, a 32% increase in the past 24 hours.
data.description: Odaily Seer's monitoring shows that the probability of SpaceX IPO before June 30th has risen to 75%, a 32% increase in 24 hours. Furthermore, the probability of SpaceX IPO before September 30th is currently reported at 86%, and the probability of SpaceX IPO before December 31st is currently reported at 90%. According to The Information, Elon Musk's SpaceX plans to file for an IPO as early as this week. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Trump said Vance is involved in negotiations with Iran to end the war.
data.description: US President Donald Trump said on Tuesday that Vice President JD Vance and Secretary of State Marco Rubio are leading negotiations with Iran and expressed optimism about reaching an agreement. Iranian sources told CNN that Tehran is willing to listen to "sustainable" proposals to end the war. Meanwhile, Israel launched a new round of strikes against Iran, and Tehran also launched an attack on Tel Aviv. An Israeli official said that an agreement "does not seem realistic at the moment." Two regional sources said that Iran has told the Trump administration that it does not want to restart negotiations with Special Envoy Steve Witkoff and Trump's son-in-law Jared Kushner, but prefers to contact Vice President JD Vance. In addition, approximately 1,000 US Army 82nd Airborne Division soldiers are expected to be deployed to the Middle East in the coming days. Republicans again vetoed a resolution requiring Trump to seek congressional authorization for future military action against Iran.

data.title: Democrat Wins Florida Special Election, Signaling Challenges for Republicans
data.description: A Democrat is set to join the Florida House of Representatives following an unexpected Republican loss in a special election. According to Jin10, Decision Desk HQ predicts that Democratic candidate Emily Gregory will defeat her Republican opponent, Jon Maples, in the election held on Tuesday. While Republicans maintain a strong majority in the Florida legislature, this unexpected outcome serves as a symbolic victory for Democrats and a warning for Republicans. As the November congressional midterm elections approach, Republicans face a challenging battle to retain their majority in both the U.S. House of Representatives and the Senate.

data.title: Supply Chain Attack on Litellm Poses Significant Security Risks
data.description: Andrej Karpathy recently reported on the X platform that litellm has been subjected to a PyPI supply chain attack. According to Odaily, executing a simple 'pip install litellm' can lead to the theft of SSH keys, AWS/GCP/Azure credentials, Kubernetes configurations, git credentials, environment variables, encrypted wallets, SSL private keys, CI/CD keys, and database passwords. Litellm has a monthly download rate of 97 million, and the risk extends to all projects dependent on litellm, such as dspy. The malicious code was online for less than an hour before being discovered due to a flaw that caused Callum McMahon's machine to crash from memory exhaustion. Karpathy highlighted that supply chain attacks are among the most threatening issues in modern software, as installing dependencies can introduce compromised packages deep within the dependency tree. He is increasingly inclined to reduce dependencies and use LLMs to directly implement simple functions.

data.title: WTI Crude Oil Falls Below $88 Per Barrel
data.description: WTI crude oil prices have dropped below $88 per barrel, experiencing a 1.01% decline. According to Odaily, this marks a significant decrease in the daily trading session.

data.title: STOCKS | Taiwan's Taiex Index Surges Amid Asian Market Recovery
data.description: Taiwan's Taiex index experienced a significant rise, climbing as much as 3.3% as Asian markets broadly rebounded. Bloomberg posted on X that the surge is attributed to growing expectations of a de-escalation in the Iran conflict, which has positively influenced investor sentiment across the region.

data.title: House Republicans Reject Senate-Backed Crypto Legislation Deal
data.description: House Republicans have turned down a Senate-supported agreement that aimed to link cryptocurrency market structure legislation with a housing package. According to NS3.AI, the proposal also sought to incorporate the House's community bank deregulation bill into the crypto measure. House Republicans expressed concerns over unresolved issues in the Senate's housing bill and are advocating for the inclusion of certain House housing proposals.

data.title: Jump Trading Seeks Dismissal of $4 Billion Lawsuit from Terraform Labs Trust
data.description: Jump Trading has requested a court to dismiss a $4 billion lawsuit filed by the Terraform Labs bankruptcy trust. According to NS3.AI, the lawsuit accuses Jump Trading of market manipulation, fraud, and self-dealing. Jump Trading argues that the case is an effort to transfer liability related to Terraform Labs' $4.4 billion penalty imposed by the SEC.

data.title: New Zealand to Tackle Fuel Crisis with Cautious Spending Strategy
data.description: New Zealand plans to address the ongoing fuel crisis with a cautious fiscal strategy, as stated by Finance Minister Nicola Willis. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that the country lacks the financial flexibility for extensive spending to mitigate the impact of rising fuel prices. The government aims to balance economic stability while addressing the challenges posed by increased costs at the pump.

The BVIX (BTC Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 52.15, a daily decrease of 2.52%. The EVIX (ETH Volatility Index) is currently quoted at 75.82, a daily increase of 0.29%. In global stock indices, the Euro Stoxx 50 rose 0.68% to 5,641.63 points; the UK FTSE 100 rose 0.32% to 10,039.28 points; and the German DAX 40 rose 0.37% to 22,943.60 points. In commodities, WTI crude oil fell 0.53% to $88.17 per barrel, while Brent crude oil fell 1.40% to $98.38 per barrel. Gate allows users to directly trade traditional financial market products on its platform, providing a one-stop solution for precious metals, forex, global equity CFDs, major indices, and commodities, achieving deep integration of crypto assets and traditional financial assets. Gate TradFi features have been fully integrated into the Gate App and Web platform, allowing users to easily participate in global asset price trading without switching platforms, unlocking more strategies and opportunities outside the crypto market, and continuously enhancing their diversified asset allocation experience.

data.title: Crypto stocks closed lower across the board in U.S. trading, with Circle (CRCL) falling more than 20%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, at the close of trading on the US stock market, the Dow Jones Industrial Average fell 0.18%, the S&P 500 fell 0.37%, and the Nasdaq Composite fell 0.84%. The crypto sector collectively weakened, with Circle falling 20.11%, Coinbase falling 9.76%, SharpLink falling 4.53%, Solana falling 2.43%, Bitmine falling 2.21%, and Strategy (MSTR) falling 1.41%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stock and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Flowdesk-linked addresses deposited 63,250 ETH into Binance within 24 hours, totaling $135 million.
data.description: According to AiYi's monitoring, the Flowdesk-related address (0x768E...a3) deposited 63,250 ETH into Binance in the past 24 hours, with a total value of $135 million and an average deposit price of $2,145. Flowdesk is a French company that primarily serves institutions, exchanges, and projects, with core businesses including market making, over-the-counter trading, and asset management.

data.title: Altcoin Season Index Rises as Cryptocurrencies Outperform Bitcoin
data.description: CoinMarketCap's Altcoin Season Index increased by six points to reach 51, indicating a shift in the cryptocurrency market. According to NS3.AI, this index evaluates the performance of the top 100 cryptocurrencies, excluding stablecoins and wrapped tokens, against Bitcoin over a 90-day period. The rise suggests that altcoins are currently outperforming Bitcoin, reflecting changing investor preferences and market dynamics.

data.title: Iranian Media Reports Attack on Residential Area in Tehran
data.description: A residential area in Tehran, the capital of Iran, has reportedly been attacked, according to Iranian media outlet SNN. Rescue personnel are currently searching through the rubble for survivors and casualties. Details about the nature of the attack and the extent of the damage remain unclear at this time.

data.title: 500 BTC linked to Irish drug traffickers were transferred on-chain after nearly 10 years of inactivity.
data.description: According to Bitcoin News, 500 BTC linked to Irish drug trafficker Clifton Collins have been transferred on-chain after being believed to be lost for nearly 10 years. Between 2011 and 2012, Collins purchased 6,000 BTC with proceeds from cannabis sales, distributing them across 12 wallets. He also wrote the private key on a piece of paper and hid it in a fishing rod case in a rented property in Galway, Ireland. After Collins' arrest in 2017, the property was emptied, and his belongings were sent to a landfill. Authorities and Collins himself believed the private key was permanently lost, and the court ruled that the funds were proceeds of crime and should be confiscated. This on-chain transfer of 500 BTC suggests that at least some of these assets may not have been lost.

data.title: Jump Trading calls Terraform Labs' $4.4 billion lawsuit a "scapegoating"
data.description: Jump Trading responded on Monday to a lawsuit filed by Todd Snyder, head of the Terraform Labs bankruptcy trusteeship. Snyder sued Jump Trading, several of its subsidiaries, and two executives last December, alleging market manipulation, investor fraud, and self-dealing, seeking $4 billion in damages. In its response, Jump Trading called the lawsuit a “transparent attempt” by Snyder to evade the $4.4 billion fine imposed on Terraform Labs by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) in 2024, and stated that Snyder “fabricated a series of allegations aimed at shifting Terraform’s liability to the SEC and its creditors onto the defendants.” Jump Trading also pointed out that the lawsuit lacked crucial details, failed to specify the actions of each defendant, did not identify the locations of the alleged violations, and was time-barred and should be dismissed. According to previous court records, when the UST de-pegged to the dollar in 2021, Jump Trading assisted Terraform Labs in maintaining the UST's peg by buying large amounts of UST to support its price, but executives from both sides kept this confidential. Terraform Labs founder Do Kwon had previously been sentenced to 15 years in prison for two counts of fraud.

data.title: Seven newly created wallets withdrew nearly 75,000 ETH from Binance within 16 hours, worth approximately $161 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens monitoring, in the past 16 hours, seven newly created wallets withdrew a total of 74,959 ETH from Binance, worth approximately $161 million, and then transferred the ETH to other wallets.

data.title: Merck's All-Cash Deal to Value Terns at $6 Billion, Financial Times Reports
data.description: Merck is reportedly set to acquire Terns in an all-cash transaction, valuing the company at approximately $6 billion, according to the Financial Times. This acquisition highlights Merck's strategic move to expand its portfolio and strengthen its position in the pharmaceutical industry. The deal is expected to enhance Merck's capabilities and market reach, providing significant growth opportunities. Further details about the transaction and its implications for both companies are anticipated as the deal progresses.

data.title: Merck Nears Final Stage in Talks with Terns, Agreement Expected Soon
data.description: Merck is reportedly in the late stages of negotiations with Terns, with a potential agreement anticipated in the coming days. According to Jin10, the discussions have progressed significantly, indicating a possible conclusion shortly. The details of the agreement remain undisclosed, but the advancement in talks suggests a strategic collaboration between the two companies. This development highlights Merck's ongoing efforts to expand its partnerships and enhance its market presence.
